access_types.name: Configuration_Access_Type
access_types.code: type Configuration_Access_Type is access all Configuration_Type;

documentation.description:
For including a Configuration_Type component in a non-limited
type.

subprograms.name: Append

documentation.description: Add data from Name file to Config (which must be Open'ed).

subprograms.name: Base_File_Name
subprograms.code: function Base_File_Name (Config : in Configuration_Type) return String

documentation.description: Return base file name (no directory path).

subprograms.name: Close

documentation.description:
Flush and close the file.

If Unread_Key is Raise_Exception, check that all keys in Config
have been read. If not, raise Config_File_Error, with message
pointing to first unread key.

subprograms.name: Close_No_Save
subprograms.code: procedure Close_No_Save (Config : in out Configuration_Type)

documentation.description: Close Config without writing changes to file.

subprograms.name: Count
subprograms.code: function Count (Config : in Configuration_Type; Key : in String) return Natural

documentation.description: Return count of keys with root Key

subprograms.name: Current
subprograms.code: function Current (Iterator : in Iterator_Type) return String

documentation.description:
Return leaf of child key at Iterator; this may be a leaf key or
the next layer root key. Mark value as read.

subprograms.name: Delete

documentation.description: Delete key at Iterator and contained keys and values from Config.Data.

subprograms.name: Delete

documentation.description: Delete Key and contained keys or value from Config.Data.

subprograms.name: File_Line_Column
subprograms.code: function File_Line_Column (Config : in Configuration_Type; Iterator : in Iterator_Type) return String

documentation.description:
Return "file:line:column: " where the current value was read, for
error messages.

subprograms.name: Find

documentation.description:
Raise Not_Found if Key is not found under Root_Key; otherwise
return iterator pointing to Key.

subprograms.name: First

documentation.description:
Return iterator pointing to first child of Iterator.Root_Key.
If Root_Key is "", this is the first child of Iterator.

If Root_Key is not found:
case Missing_Key is
when Raise_Exception => Config_File_Error is raised
when Ignore => result iterator is null (Is_Done is true).

subprograms.name: First

documentation.description:
Return iterator pointing to first child of Root_Key. If
Root_Key is "", this is the first root key.

if Root_Key is not "", and is not found:
case Missing_Key is
when Raise_Exception => Config_File_Error is raised
when Ignore => result iterator is null (Is_Done is true).

subprograms.name: Flush
subprograms.code: procedure Flush (Config : in Configuration_Type)

documentation.description: Write Config.Data to Config.Writeable_File_Name.

subprograms.name: Free
subprograms.code: procedure Free (Item : in out Configuration_Access_Type)

subprograms.name: Is_Done
subprograms.code: function Is_Done (Iterator : in Iterator_Type) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Is_Null
subprograms.code: function Is_Null (Iterator : in Iterator_Type) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Is_Open
subprograms.code: function Is_Open (Config : in Configuration_Type) return Boolean

documentation.description: True if Open has been called, and Close has not.

subprograms.name: Is_Present
subprograms.code: function Is_Present (Config : in Configuration_Type; Iterator : in Iterator_Type; Leaf : in String) return Boolean

documentation.description:
Return True if Iterator.Leaf is in Config, False otherwise. If True,
marks Key as 'read' for Unread_Key in Close.

subprograms.name: Is_Present
subprograms.code: function Is_Present (Config : in Configuration_Type; Key : in String) return Boolean

documentation.description:
Return True if Key is in Config, False otherwise. If True,
marks Key as 'read' for Unread_Key in Close.

subprograms.name: Line_Column
subprograms.code: function Line_Column (Iterator : in Iterator_Type) return String

documentation.description:
Return "line:column: " where the current value was read, for
error messages.

subprograms.name: Next
subprograms.code: procedure Next (Iterator : in out Iterator_Type)

subprograms.name: Open
Open

documentation.description:
Free Config.Data. Open the file named Name, relative to the
current directory. Read all data into Config.Data. Save full
path of file found in Config.Writeable_File_Name.

If Read_Only, all Write operations will raise
Ada.Text_IO.Use_Error. In addition, the file is not written.

If Case_Insensitive_Keys, all searches for keys will be case
insensitive (via Ada.Characters.Handling.To_Lower).

If not Read_Only, and Name is an illegal file name on the
current operating system, Ada.IO_Exceptions.Name_Error is
raised.

If Name is not found, and Missing_File is Ignore, Config.Data
is set to null, and Config.Writeable_File_Name is set to
current directory & Name.

If Name is not found, and Missing_File is Raise_Exception,
Ada.IO_Exceptions.Name_Error is raised.

If Name is found, but cannot be opened,
Ada.IO_Exceptions.Use_Error is raised.

If Name is found, but contains bad syntax, Config_File_Error is
raised, with a message giving the file name, line, and column,
in Gnu format.

If any exception is raised, the config object is not open.

subprograms.name: Read

documentation.description:
Does equivalent of Read (Current (Iterator) & "." & Leaf,
Default, Missing_Key). Exception message has the format
"file:line:column: <key> not found", where line, column are
from Iterator.

subprograms.name: Read

documentation.description: Return string value associated with Key from Config.Data.

subprograms.name: Read

documentation.description:
Read the string value associated with Key from Config.Data, store
in Result. Result_Last is set to last character of Result
written.

subprograms.name: Read_Enum

documentation.description: Return enumeration value associated with Key from Config.Data.

subprograms.name: Read_Fixed

documentation.description:
Return fixed point value associated with Key from
Config.Data.

subprograms.name: Read_Float

documentation.description:
Return floating point value associated with Key from
Config.Data.

subprograms.name: Read_Integer

documentation.description: Return integer value associated with Key in Config.Data.

subprograms.name: Read_Iterator_Enum
Read_Iterator_Fixed
Read_Iterator_Float
Read_Iterator_Integer
Read_Iterator_Modular
Read_Modular

documentation.description:
Return modular integer value associated with Key from
Config.Data.

subprograms.name: Read_String

documentation.description:
Read the string value associated with Key from Config.Data, store
in Result. Result_Last is set to last character of Result
written.

subprograms.name: Read_Value

documentation.description:
Return Value for Iterator key.

Named Read_Value instead of Read so it is not ambiguous with
Read (Config, Iterator, Leaf) below.

subprograms.name: Root

documentation.description:
Return iterator pointing to Root_Key. If Root_Key is "", this
is the first root key.

if Root_Key is not "", and is not found:
case Missing_Key is
when Raise_Exception => Config_File_Error is raised
when Ignore => result iterator is null (Is_Done is true).

subprograms.name: Write
Write

documentation.description: Write string value Value to Key in Config.Data.

documentation.description: Write enumeration value Value to Key in Config.

subprograms.name: Write_Fixed

subprograms.name: Write_Float

documentation.description: Write float value Value to Key in Config.Data.

subprograms.name: Write_Integer

subprograms.name: Write_Modular

documentation.description: Write modular integer Value to Key in Config.Data.

subprograms.name: Write_String

documentation.description: Write string value Value to Key in Config.Data.

documentation.description: Return writeable absolute file path.
